title: Hypixel Lucky Block BedWars
description: Adds custom textures for Hypixel Lucky Block Bedwars
body:
Requires [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/home) or [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)!

'Allow broken paths' for CIT Resewn could be nedded!

This is a remake of [Pluginurpc's](https://hypixel.net/threads/custom-lucky-block-texture-pack-overlay.5360986/) resource pack for newer versions and updated textures.

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/689/316/2023-07-04_11.png)
![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/689/326/snimok-ekrana-2023-07-04-112853.png)
